testcase.name: delPaymentv4
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: a string containing "{\"Payment\":{\"Success\":true,\"Data\":null,\"Messages\":[{\"Enabled\":1,\"Info\":\"Payment Deleted Successfully.\",\"Level\":1}]}}" Actual: {"Payment":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Invalid payment document number (PYMT00000000431).","Level":3}]}}

testcase.name: delPaymentv4CreditNote
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: a string containing "{\"Payment\":{\"Success\":true,\"Data\":null,\"Messages\":[{\"Enabled\":1,\"Info\":\"Credit Note Deleted Successfully.\",\"Level\":1}]}}" Actual: {"Payment":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Invalid payment document number (PYMT00000000505).","Level":3}]}}

testcase.name: postPaymentDepositv4

failure.message: expected [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"dep1","DocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000541"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Service order number and\/or task id does not exist","Level":2}]}}] but found [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"dep1","DocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000550"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Service order number and\/or task id does not exist","Level":2}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"dep1","DocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000541"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Service order number and\/or task id does not exist","Level":2}]}}] but found [{"Payment":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"dep1","DocumentNumber":"PYMT00000000550"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Service order number and\/or task id does not exist","Level":2}]}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at
